reviews.comment:
Es muy completo, GIGANTE!!!! Tiene bocha de surtidores, mecánica ligera y completa, tiene ACA, lavadero automático exterior interior (carísimo), venden seguros, repuestos, tiene las oficinas de serviclub y del ACA, estacionamiento y grúas, tiene dos lugares para inflar las cubiertas, en el FULL venden comida rápida y media gourmet que es excelente, desayuno y merienda todo muy nuevo e impecable hay que destacar a los empleados que tienen todo impecable y atentos....heeeey tiene un lugar especial para inflar bicicletas y tiene la primer estación de carga para autos eléctricos..impecable !!

(Translated by Google)
It's very complete, HUGE!!!! It has a ton of gas pumps, light and full mechanical services, it has an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) dealership, an indoor/outdoor car wash (very expensive), they sell insurance and spare parts, it has the Serviclub and ACA offices, parking and towing services, it has two tire inflation stations, the FULL service center sells fast food and gourmet snacks which are excellent, breakfast and afternoon tea are all very new and spotless. The employees deserve special mention; they keep everything impeccable and are very attentive....hey, it has a special place for inflating bicycle tires and the first electric car charging station...impeccable!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4bjRfa2tBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Desde muy chico con mi abuelo cargamos combustibles de YPF en esta estación del ACA. Jamás un problema con el combustible cuando pasamos por un mecánico. Hoy es la estación del futuro ya están listos para recibir autos eléctricos. Muy contento.

(Translated by Google)
Since I was a child, my grandfather and I have been filling up with YPF fuel at this ACA station. We've never had a problem with the fuel when we stopped by a mechanic. Today, it's the station of the future, ready to receive electric cars. Very happy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4OVlmak93EAE

reviews.comment:
La atención no es mala.. pero.. me cobraron $300 un bidón de agua desmineralizada.. cuando sale $180 en el súper o $160 en otras estaciones de servicio.. el playero me dice.. si es una vergüenza el precio .. para colmo cuando lo fui a utilizar estaba falseada la tapa y perdía... un desastre !! Me replantea si seguir como socio del ACA !

(Translated by Google)
The service is not bad... but... they charged me $300 for a can of demineralized water... when it costs $180 at the supermarket or $160 at other gas stations... the beach attendant tells me... the price is shameful... to top it off, when I went to use it, the cap was falsified and it was leaking... a disaster!! It makes me reconsider whether to continue as an ACA member!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ4NmU2MTh3RRAB
